name: Neos Fusion
name_jp: ネオス・フュージョン
desc: Special Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck that lists exactly 2 monsters as material, including "Elemental HERO Neos", by sending those monsters from your hand, Deck, or field, ignoring its Summoning conditions. For the rest of this turn after this card resolves, you cannot Special Summon monsters. If a Fusion Monster(s) you control that lists "Elemental HERO Neos" as material would be destroyed by battle or card effect, or shuffled into the Extra Deck by its own effect, you can banish this card from your GY instead.
eff: Special Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck that lists exactly 2 monsters as material, including "Elemental HERO Neos", by sending those monsters from your hand, Deck, or field, ignoring its Summoning conditions. For the rest of this turn after this card resolves, you cannot Special Summon monsters. If a Fusion Monster(s) you control that lists "Elemental HERO Neos" as material would be destroyed by battle or card effect, or shuffled into the Extra Deck by its own effect, you can banish this card from your GY instead.

action: Sends from your hand to your Graveyard
Sends from your field to your Graveyard
Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
Uses cards in the hand as Fusion Materials
Uses cards in the player's Deck as Fusion Materials
Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
Prevents returning cards from field to Extra Deck
mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
